headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels recalls products in renewable storage line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall indicates immediate operational disruption and potential reputational damage that may persist as the company addresses quality control issues.

headlines.headline: Jorvyl Securities secures $800M contract with a major logistics provider

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
